author: mark
text:
Skip ingest of GH issues with orphaned [bl-xxxx] in title

balls hands the sync plugin only open tasks, so a closed GH issue that was originally mirrored from balls reads as a new external report once the source ball is archived. Auto-creating restarted the loop: GH#37 [bl-cb4e] re-ingested as bl-279f and the next push appended a second tag.

classify() now returns Skip(OrphanedBlTag) whenever a parseable [bl-xxxx] marker fails to resolve in the open-tasks input. Adds a pull_tests unit case and an end-to-end sync integration test that pins the cycle observed in mudbungie/balls.
